moments.title: Wimbledon's Second Round Heats Up
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships continue today with second-round matches in both Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles, promising more thrilling tennis action on the grass courts of London.

angles.name: Daily Update
angles.copy: Centre Court action is in full swing at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to make it through the second round today?

angles.name: Local Angle London
angles.copy: The buzz around SW19 is electric! London is hosting the world's best as Wimbledon's second round gets underway. Any local favourites playing?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Weekend Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix weekend begins tomorrow, July 3rd, at Silverstone, with Free Practice 1 and Sprint Qualifying sessions.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Engines revving, Silverstone awaits! The British Grand Prix weekend starts tomorrow. Who's ready for a dose of high-speed F1 action?

angles.name: Silverstone Local
angles.copy: The F1 circus rolls into Silverstone! Get ready for a massive weekend as the British Grand Prix officially begins tomorrow. Expect noise, speed, and drama!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Round of 32 Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages are in full swing, with Round of 32 matches scheduled today and tomorrow, leading into the Round of 16. England won their Round of 32 match yesterday and will face Mexico on July 6th.

angles.name: Tonight's Games
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are firing! Round of 32 matches continue today. Who are you hoping goes through to the next round?

angles.name: England's Next Match
angles.copy: England are through! After beating DR Congo, the Three Lions prepare to face Mexico in the Round of 16 on Monday, July 6th. Can they keep the dream alive?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama After Casa Amor
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with dramatic fallout from the Casa Amor recoupling leaving some islanders shocked and heartbroken.

angles.name: Recoupling Fallout
angles.copy: Casa Amor delivered BIG last night! The drama is still unfolding in the Love Island villa. Who are you rooting for after that recoupling? #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Grab your popcorn! Love Island continues tonight with more tears, tantrums, and maybe a little romance after the Casa Amor bombshells.

moments.title: UK Set for Summer Heatwave Next Week
moments.blurb: Warmer weather is set to return to the UK through the weekend, with heatwave conditions likely to develop in southern and eastern parts next week, potentially reaching the low 30s Celsius.

angles.name: Heatwave Prep
angles.copy: Sun's out, shades on! A heatwave is forecast for parts of the UK next week, with temperatures potentially hitting the low 30s. Time to plan those cool-down strategies!

angles.name: Devon Weather
angles.copy: Devon, get ready to feel the heat! Warmer weather is on its way, with temperatures set to climb towards heatwave levels next week. Perfect beach day weather, perhaps?

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday, Michelle Branch!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', celebrates her 43rd birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending 43rd birthday wishes to the brilliant Michelle Branch today! Still loving those early 00s anthems. What's your favourite Michelle Branch track?

moments.title: Vince Clarke Turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday tomorrow, July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th birthday to the incredible Vince Clarke tomorrow! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his synth magic shaped the 80s and beyond. What's your favourite of his projects?

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone, known for his genre-blending hits, will celebrate his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Modern Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Post Malone's 31st birthday on July 4th! Which of his massive tracks gets you singing along every time?

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, famous for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love' and 'Hip to Be Square', celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: It's gonna be 'The Power of Love' on Sunday as Huey Lewis turns 76! What's your favourite track from Huey Lewis & The News?

moments.title: 50 Cent's 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Hip-hop icon 50 Cent, known for global hits like 'In Da Club' and 'Candy Shop', celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Rap Royalty
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's the ultimate 50 Cent track for your playlist?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

moments.title: Beck Celebrates 56th Birthday
moments.blurb: Innovative indie-rock artist Beck, known for eclectic hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', celebrates his 56th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the genre-bending genius, Beck, on Wednesday! Which of his many musical incarnations is your favourite?

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, iconic frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce 62nd Birthday to the legendary Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track or one of her solo gems?

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician and producer Jack White, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock's Modern Master
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incomparable Jack White on Thursday! From The White Stripes to his solo work, his creativity knows no bounds. What's your favourite Jack White project?

moments.title: New British TV for July
moments.blurb: July brings a wave of new British TV, including Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC One, the crime thriller 'The Dark' on ITV, and the Legally Blonde prequel 'Elle' on Prime Video. 'Trying' Season 5 is also new on Apple TV.

angles.name: New Shows to Watch
angles.copy: Looking for something new to binge this July? There's a load of new British TV dropping, from comedy 'Ann Droid' to thriller 'The Dark'. What's on your watchlist?

angles.name: Comedy Pick
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is hitting BBC One this July. Get ready for some dry wit and robot antics. #AnnDroid

moments.title: Lytham Festival Continues
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, one of the UK's premier music events, is currently underway until July 5th, featuring a diverse lineup of artists.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The party is still going strong at Lytham Festival! Who's heading down to catch the incredible lineup before it wraps up on Sunday?

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Nears Climax
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted across England and Wales, is heading towards its final stages, concluding on July 12th.

angles.name: Cricket Excitement
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is reaching its thrilling conclusion in England and Wales! Who will lift the trophy on July 12th?
